task_params.title: High Desert Route Planning Notes
lesson_points: Crosswind gusts built fast west of Mojave and needed slower pacing
Loose shoulder gravel near Kramer Junction cut safe pull-off options
Two-lane stretches with blowing dust reduced sight distance
Fuel buffer should stay higher when wind pushes consumption up
Add alternate path note for rough pavement on the Barstow side
